segments.text: Then Jesus went out and departed from the temple, and His disciples came up to show Him the buildings of the temple.
And Jesus said to them,
Do you not see all these things? Assuredly, I say to you, not one stone shall be left here upon another, that shall not be thrown down.
segments.speaker: Jesus

verses.title: The Signs of the Times and the End of the Age

segments.text: Now as He sat on the Mount of Olives, the disciples came to Him privately, saying,
Tell us, when will these things be? And what will be the sign of Your coming, and of the end of the age?
segments.speaker: Disciples

segments.text: And Jesus answered and said to them:
Take heed that no one deceives you.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Many will come in My name, saying, 'I am the Christ,' and will deceive many.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: You will hear of wars and rumors of wars. See that you are not troubled; for all these things must come to pass, but the end is not yet.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Nation will rise against nation, and kingdom against kingdom. And there will be famines, pestilences, and earthquakes in various places.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: All these are the beginning of sorrows.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Then they will deliver you up to tribulation and kill you, and you will be hated by all nations for My name's sake.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And then many will be offended, will betray one another, and will hate one another.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Then many false prophets will rise up and deceive many.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And because lawlessness will abound, the love of many will grow cold.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But he who endures to the end shall be saved.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And this gospel of the kingdom will be preached in all the world as a witness to all the nations, and then the end will come.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Therefore when you see the 'abomination of desolation,' spoken of by Daniel the prophet, standing in the holy place
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: (whoever reads, let him understand)
Then let those who are in Judea flee to the mountains.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Let him who is on the housetop not go down to take anything out of his house.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And let him who is in the field not go back to get his clothes.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But woe to those who are pregnant and to those who are nursing babies in those days!
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And pray that your flight may not be in winter or on the Sabbath.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: For then there will be great tribulation, such as has not been since the beginning of the world until this time, no, nor ever shall be.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And unless those days were shortened, no flesh would be saved; but for the elect's sake those days will be shortened.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Then if anyone says to you, 'Look, here is the Christ!' or 'There!' do not believe it.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: For false christs and false prophets will rise and show great signs and wonders to deceive, if possible, even the elect.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: See, I have told you beforehand.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Therefore if they say to you, 'Look, He is in the desert!' do not go out; or 'Look, He is in the inner rooms!' do not believe it.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: For as the lightning comes from the east and flashes to the west, so also will the coming of the Son of Man be.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: For wherever the carcass is, there the eagles will be gathered together.
segments.speaker: Jesus

verses.title: The Coming of the Son of Man

segments.text: Immediately after the tribulation of those days the sun will be darkened, and the moon will not give its light; the stars will fall from heaven, and the powers of the heavens will be shaken.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Then the sign of the Son of Man will appear in heaven, and then all the tribes of the earth will mourn, and they will see the Son of Man coming on the clouds of heaven with power and great glory.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And He will send His angels with a great sound of a trumpet, and they will gather together His elect from the four winds, from one end of heaven to the other.
segments.speaker: Jesus

verses.title: The Parable of the Fig Tree

segments.text: Now learn this parable from the fig tree: When its branch has already become tender and puts forth leaves, you know that summer is near.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: So you also, when you see all these things, know that it is near—at the doors!
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Assuredly, I say to you, this generation will by no means pass away till all these things take place.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Heaven and earth will pass away, but My words will by no means pass away.
segments.speaker: Jesus

verses.title: No One Knows the Day or Hour

segments.text: But of that day and hour no one knows, not even the angels of heaven, but My Father only.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But as the days of Noah were, so also will the coming of the Son of Man be.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: For as in the days before the flood, they were eating and drinking, marrying and giving in marriage, until the day that Noah entered the ark,
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And did not know until the flood came and took them all away, so also will the coming of the Son of Man be.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Then two men will be in the field: one will be taken and the other left.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Two women will be grinding at the mill: one will be taken and the other left.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Watch therefore, for you do not know what hour your Lord is coming.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But know this, that if the master of the house had known what hour the thief would come, he would have watched and not allowed his house to be broken into.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Therefore you also be ready, for the Son of Man is coming at an hour you do not expect.
segments.speaker: Jesus

verses.title: The Faithful Servant and the Evil Servant

segments.text: Who then is a faithful and wise servant, whom his master made ruler over his household, to give them food in due season?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Blessed is that servant whom his master, when he comes, will find so doing.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Assuredly, I say to you that he will make him ruler over all his goods.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But if that evil servant says in his heart, 'My master is delaying his coming,'
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And begins to beat his fellow servants, and to eat and drink with the drunkards,
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: The master of that servant will come on a day when he is not looking for him and at an hour that he is not aware of,
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And will cut him in two and appoint him his portion with the hypocrites. There shall be weeping and gnashing of teeth.
segments.speaker: Jesus
